item.description:
Release v4.5.2

Changes since v4.5.1

  • feat(editor): add EditorMinimapContextMenuPlugin for toggle minimap via context menu
  • feat(rag): show project name in status bar popover
  • fix(chat): allow typing while LLM is streaming to restore send queue behavior
  • fix(chat): input field no longer loses cursor when empty
  • fix(chat): skip retry for non-retryable errors like missing API key
  • fix(editor): context menu commands disappear after first use due to recent/frequent split
  • fix(rag): ensure service is initialized before checking index status
  • fix(rag): hide stale warning from UI, reduce maintenance interval to 60s
  • fix(rag): show current file on same line in indexing progress popover
  • fix(rag): update popover when project switches via ProjectsPlugin
  • fix(theme): fixed-appearance themes no longer follow system light/dark
  • fix(ui): system appearance theme should query effective color scheme directly
  • perf(chat): switch to incremental persistence to eliminate new-conversation lag
  • refactor(chat): inline pending messages in composer and fix send button state
  • refactor(core): extract LumiProjectEntry model and update plugin bootstrap
  • refactor(core): migrate project storage from kernel to ProjectsPlugin
  • refactor(plugins): adapt AgentRAGPlugin to new project storage architecture
